channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dell's AI boom is real, but profit margin hit is overlooked
item.description: Dell's gross margin dropped 26% since first reporting AI server revenue, as servers overtake computers and laptops.

item.title: Gen Z and millennials doubt the American Dream: Only 40% can afford a home
item.description: Homeownership remains a sound financial decision, but only for those who can afford it.

item.title: Eldercare disputes tear siblings apart with bitterness and estrangement
What is a 'soft' day off? How to take one without facing workplace consequences.
